mentions.note: Senior housing REIT led by Deb Cafaro; ~20% average annual gain 2+ decades; 2,100% gain since 2000 (9,200% with dividends); 112% 3-year return; 60% of earnings senior housing, 80K units; 2.5% yield; cheapest valuation (26x 2026 FFO) with best yield; 'the one who brought us'—best long-term hold in senior housing space.
Q1 beat-and-raise; 70M baby boomers turning 80 starting 2026 creates decade+ growth runway. 87% occupied, historic supply lows, 19% CAGR track record.
